  /**
   * STAT_ENCOUNTER_SPEAK_TIME - 用户说话时长
   * 当前encounter的总时长，每次覆盖掉上一次的
   */
  STAT_ENCOUNTER_SPEAK_TIME = 3,
  /** STAT_ENCOUNTER_UNMUTE - 当前encounter的 unmute 次数 */
  STAT_ENCOUNTER_UNMUTE = 4,
  /** STAT_ENCOUNTER_FOLLOW - 在当前encounter里 有follow行为的 */
  STAT_ENCOUNTER_FOLLOW = 5,
  UNRECOGNIZED = -1,
}

export function statTypeFromJSON(object: any): StatType {
  switch (object) {
    case 0:
    case "STAT_DEFAULT":
      return StatType.STAT_DEFAULT;
    case 1:
    case "STAT_ENCOUNTER_WATCH":
      return StatType.STAT_ENCOUNTER_WATCH;
    case 2:
    case "STAT_ENCOUNTER_UNWATCH":
      return StatType.STAT_ENCOUNTER_UNWATCH;
    case 3:
    case "STAT_ENCOUNTER_SPEAK_TIME":
      return StatType.STAT_ENCOUNTER_SPEAK_TIME;
    case 4:
    case "STAT_ENCOUNTER_UNMUTE":
      return StatType.STAT_ENCOUNTER_UNMUTE;
    case 5:
    case "STAT_ENCOUNTER_FOLLOW":
      return StatType.STAT_ENCOUNTER_FOLLOW;
    case -1:
    case "UNRECOGNIZED":
    default:
      return StatType.UNRECOGNIZED;
  }
}

export function statTypeToJSON(object: StatType): string {
  switch (object) {
    case StatType.STAT_DEFAULT:
      return "STAT_DEFAULT";
    case StatType.STAT_ENCOUNTER_WATCH:
      return "STAT_ENCOUNTER_WATCH";
    case StatType.STAT_ENCOUNTER_UNWATCH:
      return "STAT_ENCOUNTER_UNWATCH";
    case StatType.STAT_ENCOUNTER_SPEAK_TIME:
      return "STAT_ENCOUNTER_SPEAK_TIME";
    case StatType.STAT_ENCOUNTER_UNMUTE:
      return "STAT_ENCOUNTER_UNMUTE";
    case StatType.STAT_ENCOUNTER_FOLLOW:
      return "STAT_ENCOUNTER_FOLLOW";
    case StatType.UNRECOGNIZED:
    default:
      return "UNRECOGNIZED";
  }
}

export interface UserInfo {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  userId?: number | undefined;
  userName?: string | undefined;
  userGender?: number | undefined;
  avatarUrl?: string | undefined;
  avatarId?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 新增的mmoStatus */
  mmoStatus?:
    | MMOStatus
    | undefined;
  /** 首次设置的默认avatarId */
  firstAvatarId?: string | undefined;
}

export interface UserStatus {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  userId?: number | undefined;
  userPosX?: number | undefined;
  userPosY?: number | undefined;
  userPosZ?: number | undefined;
  userRotX?: number | undefined;
  userRotY?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /**
   * int32 userFaceX = 8;
   * 	int32 userFaceY = 9;
   * 	int32 userFaceZ = 10;
   */
  userRotZ?: number | undefined;
}

/** 客户端传来的手机信息 */
export interface PhoneInfo {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  platform?: Platform | undefined;
}

/** 进入房间 */
export interface C2SEnterRoom {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  /** 用户id */
  playerId?: number | undefined;
  roomId?: number | undefined;
  user?: UserStatus | undefined;
  userInfo?: UserInfo | undefined;
  phoneInfo?:
    | PhoneInfo
    | undefined;
  /** encounter的Id */
  encounterId?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 好友Id */
  friendId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /**
   * 会话邀请进房
   * 如果房间的权限是 public，则不用 inviteToken
   * 如果房间权限是 private，则inviteToken 填写为 房主的id
   */
  inviteToken?: number | undefined;
}

/** 进入房间 返回的消息 */
export interface S2CEnterRoom {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  /** 结果状态码 */
  result?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 当前房间的Id号 */
  roomId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 当前房间的用户 id列表 */
  userInfoList?: UserInfo[] | undefined;
  userStatusList?:
    | UserStatus[]
    | undefined;
  /** 当前房间的椅子列表 */
  seatList?:
    | Seat[]
    | undefined;
  /** 当前房间的 沙发列表 */
  sofaList?:
    | Sofa[]
    | undefined;
  /** 玩家的肩膀信息 */
  userShoulderList?:
    | UserStatus[]
    | undefined;
  /** 当前房间的房主id */
  roomInfo?: RoomData | undefined;
}

/** 其他用户进入房间的 单一广播消息 */
export interface S2CBroadCastEnterRoom {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  /** 结果状态码 */
  result?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 当前房间的Id号 */
  roomId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 当前房间的用户 id列表 */
  userInfo?:
    | UserInfo
    | undefined;
  /** 新进入房间的用户状态 */
  userStatus?: UserStatus | undefined;
}

/** 离开房间 */
export interface C2SLeaveRoom {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  /** 用户Id */
  playerId?: number | undefined;
}

export interface S2CLeaveRoom {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  /** 返回确认码 */
  result?: number | undefined;
  playerId?: number | undefined;
}

export interface S2CBroadCastLeaveRoom {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  /** 返回确认码 */
  playerId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 可能换房主了 0 */
  ownerId?: number | undefined;
}

/** 房间同步当前的用户状态 */
export interface C2SSyncMessage {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  /** 房间号 */
  roomId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 同步用户消息 */
  user?: UserStatus | undefined;
}

/**
 * 房间 同步 当前用户状态的回包 确认
 * 当前用户会收到 S2C_SyncMessage
 * 其他用户会收到 S2C_BroadCastSyncMessage
 */
export interface S2CSyncMessage {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  roomId?: number | undefined;
  playerId?: number | undefined;
  user?: UserStatus | undefined;
}

/** 房间内 同步广播所有人的消息 */
export interface S2CBroadCastSyncMessage {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  users?: UserStatus[] | undefined;
}

/** 游戏状态 */
export interface GameStatus {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  /** 对应 GameStatusIds */
  gameStatusId?:
    | GameStatusId
    | undefined;
  /** 距离当前状态结束剩余的秒数(s) -1 默认无限 */
  leftTime?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 服务器发送该时间的时间戳 */
  sendTime?: number | undefined;
}

/** 超时，或者全部选择完成后，需要单独广播游戏状态的协议 */
export interface S2CBroadCastGameStatus {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  gameStatus?: GameStatus | undefined;
}

export interface C2SSitSeat {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  seatId?: number | undefined;
}

/** 椅子坐下的回包 */

/** 离开椅子 */
export interface C2SLeaveSeat {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  seatId?: number | undefined;
}

/** 离开椅子 */
export interface S2CLeaveSeat {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  result?: SeatResultCode | undefined;
}

/** 椅子状态有变化，广播椅子状态 */
export interface S2CBroadCastSeatStatus {
  $type?: string | undefined;

  seatList?: Seat[] | undefined;

}

/** 开始游戏 按钮 满三个人， 任何人可以点击开始按钮 可以开始 */
export interface C2SStartGame {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  playerId?: number | undefined;
}

/** 给当前玩家的回复确认信息 */
export interface S2CStartGame {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  result?: RoomErrorCode | undefined;
}

/** 点击开始游戏后，初始化广播的协议，后面每经过一轮 */
export interface S2CBroadCastGameReady {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  /** 当前用户的角色身份 是裁判 还是 玩家 */
  role?:
    | Role
    | undefined;
  /** 当前游戏数据 */
  score?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 本轮黑牌 */
  blackCard?:
    | Card
    | undefined;
  /** 当前用户的白牌卡牌列表 */
  cardList?:
    | Card[]
    | undefined;
  /** 裁判的 playerId */
  czarPlayerId?: number | undefined;
  playerStatList?: PlayerGameStat[] | undefined;
}

/** 玩家的游戏数据 */
export interface PlayerGameStat {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  playerId?: number | undefined;
  score?: number | undefined;
}

/** 当前玩家 从手里卡组选择一张卡牌 */
export interface C2SSelectCard {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  cardId?: number | undefined;
}

/** 回复 选择结果，与剩余卡牌，如果超时未收到选择卡牌的，则直接发下面的协议 */
export interface S2CSelectCard {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  /** 结果状态码 */
  result?:
    | RoomErrorCode
    | undefined;
  /** 当前玩家-剩余的卡牌列表，此时不会补齐卡牌 */
  cardId?: number | undefined;
}

/** 该消息广播给所有玩家玩家选择牌的状态 */
export interface S2CBroadCastPlayerSelectCard {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  card?: Card[] | undefined;
}

/** 裁判揭牌 */
export interface C2SCzarOpenCard {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  cardId?: number | undefined;
}

export interface S2CCzarOpenCard {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  result?: number | undefined;
  cardId?: number | undefined;
}

/**
 * 广播给其他玩家 当前揭牌
 * 如果当前裁判始终未选择牌，则广播所有牌
 * 裁判点选的时候 广播一张牌
 */
export interface S2CBroadCastOpenCard {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  cardId?: number[] | undefined;
}

/** 裁判 选择本轮获胜的玩家 */
export interface C2SCzarSelectWinCard {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  cardId?: number | undefined;
}

/** 回复 选择结果，与剩余卡牌，如果超时未收到选择卡牌的，则直接发下面的协议 */
export interface S2CCzarSelectWinCard {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  result?: RoomErrorCode | undefined;
  cardId?: number | undefined;
}

/** 广播给所有玩家 谁赢了 */
export interface S2CBroadcastCzarWinCard {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  winCardId?: number | undefined;
  winPlayerId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 当前的赢的玩家的分数 */
  score?: number | undefined;
}

/** 卡牌的数据 */
export interface Card {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  cardId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 卡牌的类型 黑牌 还是 白牌 */
  type?:
    | CardType
    | undefined;
  /** 卡牌的内容 */
  content?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 从哪个玩家选出的 - 广播给裁判的时候用的 */
  fromPlayerId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 选牌之后 是否被裁判打开 */
  isOpen?: boolean | undefined;
}

/**
 * 这个会强制 服务器针对这个玩家发起一个推流
 * for dev
 */
export interface C2SFakeStartEncounter {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  /**
   * fakeEncounter中的玩家Id列表
   * 包含当前玩家的Id*
   * 多个玩家，才可以模拟reAnchor*
   */
  playerIds?:
    | number[]
    | undefined;
  /** 指定的 anchor的 玩家id */
  anchorId?: number | undefined;
}

/**
 * 正常情况下，服务器主动推下这个消息
 * 重新更换anchor的情况下 也发这个消息
 */
export interface S2CStartEncounter {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  /** 当前的encounter 信息 */
  encounterInfo?:
    | EncounterEntity
    | undefined;
  /** 是否是二次发起的 将Anchor 从last client -> current client */
  isReAnchor?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /**
   * 当前客户端是anchor的情况下(已经推流中)，
   * 如果当前 encounter 信息有更新的话 则为true
   */
  isUpdate?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** premadeId */
  premadeId?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** encounter 开始时间 */
  startTime?: number | undefined;
}

/**
 * 客户端 需要给服务器回复ack一下，如果ack时间超过阈值，则会自动更换下一个
 * 待定?
 */
export interface C2SStartEncounter {
  $type?: string | undefined;
  isSuccess?: boolean | undefined;
}

function createBaseUserInfo(): UserInfo {
  return { userId: 0, userName: "", userGender: 0, avatarUrl: "", avatarId: "", mmoStatus: 0, firstAvatarId: "" };
}

export const UserInfo: MessageFns<UserInfo> = {
  $type: "Room.UserInfo",
  encode(message: UserInfo, writer: BinaryWriter = new BinaryWriter()): BinaryWriter {
    if (message.userId !== undefined && message.userId !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(8).int32(message.userId);
    }
    if (message.userName !== undefined && message.userName !== "") {
      writer.uint32(18).string(message.userName);
    }
    if (message.userGender !== undefined && message.userGender !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(24).int32(message.userGender);
    }
    if (message.avatarUrl !== undefined && message.avatarUrl !== "") {
      writer.uint32(34).string(message.avatarUrl);
    }
    if (message.avatarId !== undefined && message.avatarId !== "") {
      writer.uint32(42).string(message.avatarId);
    }
    if (message.mmoStatus !== undefined && message.mmoStatus !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(48).int32(message.mmoStatus);
    }
    if (message.firstAvatarId !== undefined && message.firstAvatarId !== "") {
      writer.uint32(58).string(message.firstAvatarId);
    }
    return writer;
  },

  decode(input: BinaryReader | Uint8Array, length?: number): UserInfo {
    const reader = input instanceof BinaryReader ? input : new BinaryReader(input);
    const end = length === undefined ? reader.len : reader.pos + length;
    const message = createBaseUserInfo();
    while (reader.pos < end) {
      const tag = reader.uint32();
      switch (tag >>> 3) {
        case 1: {
          if (tag !== 8) {
            break;
          }

          message.userId = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 2: {
          if (tag !== 18) {
            break;
          }

          message.userName = reader.string();
          continue;
        }
        case 3: {
          if (tag !== 24) {
            break;
          }

          message.userGender = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 4: {
          if (tag !== 34) {
            break;
          }

          message.avatarUrl = reader.string();
          continue;
        }
        case 5: {
          if (tag !== 42) {
            break;
          }

          message.avatarId = reader.string();
          continue;
        }
        case 6: {
          if (tag !== 48) {
            break;
          }

          message.mmoStatus = reader.int32() as any;
          continue;
        }
        case 7: {
          if (tag !== 58) {
            break;
          }

          message.firstAvatarId = reader.string();
          continue;
        }
      }
      if ((tag & 7) === 4 || tag === 0) {
        break;
      }
      reader.skip(tag & 7);
    }
    return message;
  },

  fromJSON(object: any): UserInfo {
    return {
      userId: isSet(object.userId) ? globalThis.Number(object.userId) : 0,
      userName: isSet(object.userName) ? globalThis.String(object.userName) : "",
      userGender: isSet(object.userGender) ? globalThis.Number(object.userGender) : 0,
      avatarUrl: isSet(object.avatarUrl) ? globalThis.String(object.avatarUrl) : "",
      avatarId: isSet(object.avatarId)
        ? globalThis.String(object.avatarId)
        : isSet(object.avatar_id)
        ? globalThis.String(object.avatar_id)
        : "",
      mmoStatus: isSet(object.mmoStatus) ? mMOStatusFromJSON(object.mmoStatus) : 0,
      firstAvatarId: isSet(object.firstAvatarId) ? globalThis.String(object.firstAvatarId) : "",
    };
  },

  toJSON(message: UserInfo): unknown {
    const obj: any = {};
    if (message.userId !== undefined && message.userId !== 0) {
      obj.userId = Math.round(message.userId);
    }
    if (message.userName !== undefined && message.userName !== "") {
      obj.userName = message.userName;
    }
    if (message.userGender !== undefined && message.userGender !== 0) {
      obj.userGender = Math.round(message.userGender);
    }
    if (message.avatarUrl !== undefined && message.avatarUrl !== "") {
      obj.avatarUrl = message.avatarUrl;
    }
    if (message.avatarId !== undefined && message.avatarId !== "") {
      obj.avatarId = message.avatarId;
    }
    if (message.mmoStatus !== undefined && message.mmoStatus !== 0) {
      obj.mmoStatus = mMOStatusToJSON(message.mmoStatus);
    }
    if (message.firstAvatarId !== undefined && message.firstAvatarId !== "") {
      obj.firstAvatarId = message.firstAvatarId;
    }
    return obj;
  },

  create(base?: DeepPartial<UserInfo>): UserInfo {
    return UserInfo.fromPartial(base ?? {});
  },
  fromPartial(object: DeepPartial<UserInfo>): UserInfo {
    const message = createBaseUserInfo();
    message.userId = object.userId ?? 0;
    message.userName = object.userName ?? "";
    message.userGender = object.userGender ?? 0;
    message.avatarUrl = object.avatarUrl ?? "";
    message.avatarId = object.avatarId ?? "";
    message.mmoStatus = object.mmoStatus ?? 0;
    message.firstAvatarId = object.firstAvatarId ?? "";
    return message;
  },
};

function createBaseUserStatus(): UserStatus {
  return { userId: 0, userPosX: 0, userPosY: 0, userPosZ: 0, userRotX: 0, userRotY: 0, userRotZ: 0 };
}

export const UserStatus: MessageFns<UserStatus> = {
  $type: "Room.UserStatus",
  encode(message: UserStatus, writer: BinaryWriter = new BinaryWriter()): BinaryWriter {
    if (message.userId !== undefined && message.userId !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(8).int32(message.userId);
    }
    if (message.userPosX !== undefined && message.userPosX !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(16).int32(message.userPosX);
    }
    if (message.userPosY !== undefined && message.userPosY !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(24).int32(message.userPosY);
    }
    if (message.userPosZ !== undefined && message.userPosZ !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(32).int32(message.userPosZ);
    }
    if (message.userRotX !== undefined && message.userRotX !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(40).int32(message.userRotX);
    }
    if (message.userRotY !== undefined && message.userRotY !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(48).int32(message.userRotY);
    }
    if (message.userRotZ !== undefined && message.userRotZ !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(56).int32(message.userRotZ);
    }
    return writer;
  },

  decode(input: BinaryReader | Uint8Array, length?: number): UserStatus {
    const reader = input instanceof BinaryReader ? input : new BinaryReader(input);
    const end = length === undefined ? reader.len : reader.pos + length;
    const message = createBaseUserStatus();
    while (reader.pos < end) {
      const tag = reader.uint32();
      switch (tag >>> 3) {
        case 1: {
          if (tag !== 8) {
            break;
          }

          message.userId = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 2: {
          if (tag !== 16) {
            break;
          }

          message.userPosX = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 3: {
          if (tag !== 24) {
            break;
          }

          message.userPosY = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 4: {
          if (tag !== 32) {
            break;
          }

          message.userPosZ = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 5: {
          if (tag !== 40) {
            break;
          }

          message.userRotX = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 6: {
          if (tag !== 48) {
            break;
          }

          message.userRotY = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 7: {
          if (tag !== 56) {
            break;
          }

          message.userRotZ = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
      }
      if ((tag & 7) === 4 || tag === 0) {
        break;
      }
      reader.skip(tag & 7);
    }
    return message;
  },

  fromJSON(object: any): UserStatus {
    return {
      userId: isSet(object.userId) ? globalThis.Number(object.userId) : 0,
      userPosX: isSet(object.userPosX) ? globalThis.Number(object.userPosX) : 0,
      userPosY: isSet(object.userPosY) ? globalThis.Number(object.userPosY) : 0,
      userPosZ: isSet(object.userPosZ) ? globalThis.Number(object.userPosZ) : 0,

export const EncounterEntity: MessageFns<EncounterEntity> = {

    if (message.encounterId !== undefined && message.encounterId !== "") {
      writer.uint32(10).string(message.encounterId);
    }
    if (message.players !== undefined && message.players.length !== 0) {
      for (const v of message.players) {
        EncounterUserInfo.encode(v!, writer.uint32(18).fork()).join();
      }
    }
    if (message.encounterX !== undefined && message.encounterX !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(24).int32(message.encounterX);
    }
    if (message.encounterY !== undefined && message.encounterY !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(32).int32(message.encounterY);
    }
    if (message.encounterZ !== undefined && message.encounterZ !== 0) {

    const end = length === undefined ? reader.len : reader.pos + length;
    const message = createBaseEncounterEntity();

      switch (tag >>> 3) {
        case 1: {
          if (tag !== 10) {
            break;
          }

          message.encounterId = reader.string();
          continue;
        }
        case 2: {
          if (tag !== 18) {
            break;
          }

          const el = EncounterUserInfo.decode(reader, reader.uint32());
          if (el !== undefined) {
            message.players!.push(el);
          }
          continue;
        }
        case 3: {
          if (tag !== 24) {
            break;
          }

          message.encounterX = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 4: {
          if (tag !== 32) {
            break;
          }

          message.encounterY = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 5: {
          if (tag !== 40) {
            break;
          }

          message.encounterZ = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
      }
      if ((tag & 7) === 4 || tag === 0) {
        break;
      }
      reader.skip(tag & 7);
    }
    return message;

  fromJSON(object: any): EncounterEntity {

      encounterId: isSet(object.encounterId) ? globalThis.String(object.encounterId) : "",

        : [],

      encounterY: isSet(object.encounterY) ? globalThis.Number(object.encounterY) : 0,

    if (message.encounterY !== undefined && message.encounterY !== 0) {

    }
    if (message.encounterZ !== undefined && message.encounterZ !== 0) {
      obj.encounterZ = Math.round(message.encounterZ);
    }
    return obj;
  },

  create(base?: DeepPartial<EncounterEntity>): EncounterEntity {
    return EncounterEntity.fromPartial(base ?? {});
  },
  fromPartial(object: DeepPartial<EncounterEntity>): EncounterEntity {
    const message = createBaseEncounterEntity();

type Builtin = Date | Function | Uint8Array | string | number | boolean | undefined;

export type DeepPartial<T> = T extends Builtin ? T
  : T extends globalThis.Array<infer U> ? globalThis.Array<DeepPartial<U>>

  : Partial<T>;

function longToNumber(int64: { toString(): string }): number {
  const num = globalThis.Number(int64.toString());
  if (num > globalThis.Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER) {
    throw new globalThis.Error("Value is larger than Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER");
  }
  if (num < globalThis.Number.MIN_SAFE_INTEGER) {
    throw new globalThis.Error("Value is smaller than Number.MIN_SAFE_INTEGER");
  }
  return num;
}

function isSet(value: any): boolean {
  return value !== null && value !== undefined;
}

export interface MessageFns<T> {
  readonly $type: string;
  encode(message: T, writer?: BinaryWriter): BinaryWriter;
  decode(input: BinaryReader | Uint8Array, length?: number): T;

  toJSON(message: T): unknown;
  create(base?: DeepPartial<T>): T;
  fromPartial(object: DeepPartial<T>): T;
}
